summary: Comprehensive testing of HikmabyLM Admin Panel APIs and Web UI. All 17 backend tests pass (100%). Admin panel web pages (login, dashboard, scholars, users) all function correctly with proper authentication and CRUD operations.

issues: Some TEST_ prefixed scholars remain in the list from previous test runs - should consider cleanup

critical_code_review_comments: Admin user (admin@hikma-admin.com) was created manually but ADMIN_EMAILS constant only contains loubna.serrar@gmail.com - consider adding admin@hikma-admin.com to the whitelist for consistency
Test data cleanup: Consider implementing a cleanup mechanism to remove TEST_ prefixed data
seed_data_creation: Multiple TEST_ prefixed scholars and users created during CRUD tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All admin panel features working: health API, admin login, scholars CRUD, courses list, audios list, users list, grant/revoke free access, admin stats. Admin token stored in localStorage. Web panel uses HTML templates served by FastAPI.

web_pages_tested.admin_panel_login: ✅ Page loads, form elements present, login redirects to dashboard
web_pages_tested.admin_panel_dashboard: ✅ Stats cards displayed (9 scholars, 38 courses, 15 audios, 8 users), recent items shown
web_pages_tested.admin_panel_scholars: ✅ Scholars list with actions (edit/toggle/delete), add new button, search
web_pages_tested.admin_panel_users: ✅ Users list with roles, access status, grant/revoke buttons
